slides.title: PhD CET Mock Exam 5 - Research Methodology
slides.subtitle: 50 Practice MCQs for Doctoral Entrance Examination • Topic 1-5

slides.question: Q1: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Case Study Method**?
options: Its primary focus is lived experience description.
Its primary focus is numerical and statistical analysis.
Its primary focus is abstract model development.
Its primary focus is in-depth single unit analysis.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Case Study Method** is: **in-depth single unit analysis**.

slides.question: Q2: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Experimental Research**?
options: Its primary focus is non-numerical thematic analysis.
Its primary focus is cause-and-effect verification.
Its primary focus is data-driven theory generation.
Its primary focus is critical factual evaluation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Experimental Research** is: **cause-and-effect verification**.

slides.question: Q3: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Diagnostic Research**?
options: Its primary focus is immersive cultural study.
Its primary focus is cause-and-association diagnosis.
Its primary focus is abstract concept re-interpretation.
Its primary focus is describing 'what is'.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Diagnostic Research** is: **cause-and-association diagnosis**.

slides.question: Q4: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Evaluative Research**?
options: Its primary focus is worth and outcome assessment.
Its primary focus is after-the-fact investigation.
Its primary focus is problem definition and feasibility.
Its primary focus is basic / pure research.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Evaluative Research** is: **worth and outcome assessment**.

slides.question: Q5: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Comparative Research**?
options: Its primary focus is similarity and difference analysis.
Its primary focus is past event analysis.
Its primary focus is practical problem-solving.
Its primary focus is long-term repeated observation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Comparative Research** is: **similarity and difference analysis**.

slides.question: Q6: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Deductive Research Approach**?
options: Its primary focus is single point-in-time snapshot.
Its primary focus is top-down theory testing.
Its primary focus is immediate local action.
Its primary focus is empirical observation and evidence.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Deductive Research Approach** is: **top-down theory testing**.

slides.question: Q7: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Inductive Research Approach**?
options: Its primary focus is in-depth single unit analysis.
Its primary focus is bottom-up theory construction.
Its primary focus is numerical and statistical analysis.
Its primary focus is abstract model development.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Inductive Research Approach** is: **bottom-up theory construction**.

slides.question: Q8: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Phenomenological Research**?
options: Its primary focus is non-numerical thematic analysis.
Its primary focus is lived experience description.
Its primary focus is critical factual evaluation.
Its primary focus is cause-and-effect verification.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Phenomenological Research** is: **lived experience description**.

slides.question: Q9: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Grounded Theory**?
options: Its primary focus is describing 'what is'.
Its primary focus is cause-and-association diagnosis.
Its primary focus is data-driven theory generation.
Its primary focus is abstract concept re-interpretation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Grounded Theory** is: **data-driven theory generation**.

slides.question: Q10: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Ethnographic Research**?
options: Its primary focus is immersive cultural study.
Its primary focus is problem definition and feasibility.
Its primary focus is after-the-fact investigation.
Its primary focus is worth and outcome assessment.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Ethnographic Research** is: **immersive cultural study**.

slides.question: Q11: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Exploratory Design**?
options: Its primary focus is expected effect statement.
Its primary focus is relationship-masking variable.
Its primary focus is direction-free relationship statement.
Its primary focus is insight and familiarity collection.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Exploratory Design** is: **insight and familiarity collection**.

slides.question: Q12: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Descriptive Design**?
options: Its primary focus is constant baseline variable.
Its primary focus is false positive (rejecting true H0).
Its primary focus is accurate characteristic profiling.
Its primary focus is confound-free cause-effect trust.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Descriptive Design** is: **accurate characteristic profiling**.

slides.question: Q13: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Control Group**?
options: Its primary focus is critical gap analysis of past works.
Its primary focus is false negative (accepting false H0).
Its primary focus is results generalization capability.
Its primary focus is untreated baseline group.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Control Group** is: **untreated baseline group**.

slides.question: Q14: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Quasi-Experimental Design**?
options: Its primary focus is manipulated variable.
Its primary focus is non-randomized comparison design.
Its primary focus is framework for data collection and analysis.
Its primary focus is clear problem identification.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Quasi-Experimental Design** is: **non-randomized comparison design**.

slides.question: Q15: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Double-Blind Study**?
options: Its primary focus is participant-researcher bias prevention.
Its primary focus is measured outcome variable.
Its primary focus is conceptual schema explanation.
Its primary focus is testable tentative assumption.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Double-Blind Study** is: **participant-researcher bias prevention**.

slides.question: Q16: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Statistical Power**?
options: Its primary focus is no-effect assumption.
Its primary focus is feasibility and scale trial.
Its primary focus is uncontrolled confounding variable.
Its primary focus is correct rejection probability (1-beta).
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Statistical Power** is: **correct rejection probability (1-beta)**.

slides.question: Q17: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Directional Hypothesis**?
options: Its primary focus is insight and familiarity collection.
Its primary focus is relationship-masking variable.
Its primary focus is expected relationship direction statement.
Its primary focus is expected effect statement.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Directional Hypothesis** is: **expected relationship direction statement**.

slides.question: Q18: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Non-Directional Hypothesis**?
options: Its primary focus is direction-free relationship statement.
Its primary focus is false positive (rejecting true H0).
Its primary focus is accurate characteristic profiling.
Its primary focus is constant baseline variable.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Non-Directional Hypothesis** is: **direction-free relationship statement**.

slides.question: Q19: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Internal Validity**?
options: Its primary focus is critical gap analysis of past works.
Its primary focus is false negative (accepting false H0).
Its primary focus is untreated baseline group.
Its primary focus is confound-free cause-effect trust.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Internal Validity** is: **confound-free cause-effect trust**.

slides.question: Q20: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **External Validity**?
options: Its primary focus is manipulated variable.
Its primary focus is non-randomized comparison design.
Its primary focus is clear problem identification.
Its primary focus is results generalization capability.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **External Validity** is: **results generalization capability**.

slides.question: Q21: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Questionnaire**?
options: Its primary focus is standardized self-report tool.
Its primary focus is multi-source validation technique.
Its primary focus is judgmental target selection.
Its primary focus is fixed interval sampling.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Questionnaire** is: **standardized self-report tool**.

slides.question: Q22: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Structured Interview**?
options: Its primary focus is geographical or group-level division.
Its primary focus is referral-based chain network.
Its primary focus is rigid standardized interview.
Its primary focus is completion ratio of sample.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Structured Interview** is: **rigid standardized interview**.

slides.question: Q23: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Likert Scale**?
options: Its primary focus is complex multi-stage unit selection.
Its primary focus is measuring ordinal/interval agreement levels.
Its primary focus is frame-population mismatch error.
Its primary focus is questionnaire design validation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Likert Scale** is: **measuring ordinal/interval agreement levels**.

slides.question: Q24: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Semantic Differential Scale**?
options: Its primary focus is unbiased generalization potential.
Its primary focus is bipolar adjective scaling.
Its primary focus is convenience and subjectivity selection.
Its primary focus is systematic selection skew.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Semantic Differential Scale** is: **bipolar adjective scaling**.

slides.question: Q25: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Observation Method**?
options: Its primary focus is systematic behavior recording.
Its primary focus is lottery or random number selection.
Its primary focus is original direct collection.
Its primary focus is accessibility-based collection.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Observation Method** is: **systematic behavior recording**.

slides.question: Q26: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Focus Group Discussion**?
options: Its primary focus is ensuring representation of subgroups.
Its primary focus is non-random strata filling.
Its primary focus is previously collected material.
Its primary focus is moderated group discussion.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Focus Group Discussion** is: **moderated group discussion**.

slides.question: Q27: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Content Analysis**?
options: Its primary focus is judgmental target selection.
Its primary focus is standardized self-report tool.
Its primary focus is qualitative data theme analysis.
Its primary focus is fixed interval sampling.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Content Analysis** is: **qualitative data theme analysis**.

slides.question: Q28: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Data Triangulation**?
options: Its primary focus is rigid standardized interview.
Its primary focus is geographical or group-level division.
Its primary focus is referral-based chain network.
Its primary focus is multi-source validation technique.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Data Triangulation** is: **multi-source validation technique**.

slides.question: Q29: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Response Rate**?
options: Its primary focus is frame-population mismatch error.
Its primary focus is complex multi-stage unit selection.
Its primary focus is completion ratio of sample.
Its primary focus is measuring ordinal/interval agreement levels.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Response Rate** is: **completion ratio of sample**.

slides.question: Q30: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Pilot Testing**?
options: Its primary focus is systematic selection skew.
Its primary focus is convenience and subjectivity selection.
Its primary focus is bipolar adjective scaling.
Its primary focus is questionnaire design validation.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Pilot Testing** is: **questionnaire design validation**.

slides.question: Q31: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Confidence Interval**?
options: Its primary focus is distribution-free two-group comparison.
Its primary focus is dispersion measurement tool.
Its primary focus is parameter estimation range.
Its primary focus is distribution-free statistical testing.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Confidence Interval** is: **parameter estimation range**.

slides.question: Q32: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Degrees of Freedom**?
options: Its primary focus is squared dispersion measure.
Its primary focus is independent observation count limit.
Its primary focus is distribution-free paired comparison.
Its primary focus is categorical association verification.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Degrees of Freedom** is: **independent observation count limit**.

slides.question: Q33: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Standard Error of the Mean**?
options: Its primary focus is distribution-free multi-group comparison.
Its primary focus is sample mean precision estimate.
Its primary focus is comparing three or more group means.
Its primary focus is linear correlation index.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Standard Error of the Mean** is: **sample mean precision estimate**.

slides.question: Q34: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Normal Distribution**?
options: Its primary focus is monotonic rank relationship score.
Its primary focus is arithmetic average calculation.
Its primary focus is symmetric bell-curve model.
Its primary focus is comparing two group means.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Normal Distribution** is: **symmetric bell-curve model**.

slides.question: Q35: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Positively Skewed**?
options: Its primary focus is right-tail distribution skew.
Its primary focus is middle positional indicator.
Its primary focus is slope relationship prediction.
Its primary focus is large-sample mean comparison.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Positively Skewed** is: **right-tail distribution skew**.

slides.question: Q36: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Negatively Skewed**?
options: Its primary focus is left-tail distribution skew.
Its primary focus is alpha threshold for hypothesis rejection.
Its primary focus is highest frequency value.
Its primary focus is distribution-assumed statistical testing.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Negatively Skewed** is: **left-tail distribution skew**.

slides.question: Q37: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Kurtosis**?
options: Its primary focus is distribution-free statistical testing.
Its primary focus is peakedness or flatness score.
Its primary focus is dispersion measurement tool.
Its primary focus is parameter estimation range.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Kurtosis** is: **peakedness or flatness score**.

slides.question: Q38: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Mann-Whitney U Test**?
options: Its primary focus is distribution-free two-group comparison.
Its primary focus is categorical association verification.
Its primary focus is independent observation count limit.
Its primary focus is squared dispersion measure.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Mann-Whitney U Test** is: **distribution-free two-group comparison**.

slides.question: Q39: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test**?
options: Its primary focus is sample mean precision estimate.
Its primary focus is linear correlation index.
Its primary focus is distribution-free paired comparison.
Its primary focus is comparing three or more group means.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test** is: **distribution-free paired comparison**.

slides.question: Q40: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Kruskal-Wallis Test**?
options: Its primary focus is symmetric bell-curve model.
Its primary focus is comparing two group means.
Its primary focus is distribution-free multi-group comparison.
Its primary focus is monotonic rank relationship score.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Kruskal-Wallis Test** is: **distribution-free multi-group comparison**.

slides.question: Q41: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Abstract**?
options: Its primary focus is citation and publication volume balance metric.
Its primary focus is private interest compromising professional work.
Its primary focus is author-page citation style.
Its primary focus is brief paper summary overview.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Abstract** is: **brief paper summary overview**.

slides.question: Q42: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Footnote**?
options: Its primary focus is thanking contributors and funders section.
Its primary focus is bottom-of-page contextual note.
Its primary focus is notes-bibliography citation formatting.
Its primary focus is human subject safety oversight board.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Footnote** is: **bottom-of-page contextual note**.

slides.question: Q43: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Research Proposal**?
options: Its primary focus is legal protection of mental creations.
Its primary focus is voluntary participant agreement process.
Its primary focus is planned research blueprint outline.
Its primary focus is standardized academic chapter sequence.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Research Proposal** is: **planned research blueprint outline**.

slides.question: Q44: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Research Monograph**?
options: Its primary focus is expert quality check before publication.
Its primary focus is monopoly right for technical invention.
Its primary focus is academic theft and misattribution.
Its primary focus is single-subject specialist writing piece.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Research Monograph** is: **single-subject specialist writing piece**.

slides.question: Q45: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Citation Indexing**?
options: Its primary focus is protection of expression of ideas.
Its primary focus is tracking scientific citations system.
Its primary focus is own-work recycling without citation.
Its primary focus is barrier-free research accessibility.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Citation Indexing** is: **tracking scientific citations system**.

slides.question: Q46: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Fabrication**?
options: Its primary focus is author-date citation style.
Its primary focus is inventing non-existent research data.
Its primary focus is consulted sources comprehensive list.
Its primary focus is journal citation frequency index.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Fabrication** is: **inventing non-existent research data**.

slides.question: Q47: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Falsification**?
options: Its primary focus is brief paper summary overview.
Its primary focus is citation and publication volume balance metric.
Its primary focus is manipulating active research data.
Its primary focus is author-page citation style.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Falsification** is: **manipulating active research data**.

slides.question: Q48: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Conflict of Interest**?
options: Its primary focus is bottom-of-page contextual note.
Its primary focus is notes-bibliography citation formatting.
Its primary focus is human subject safety oversight board.
Its primary focus is private interest compromising professional work.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Conflict of Interest** is: **private interest compromising professional work**.

slides.question: Q49: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Acknowledgment Section**?
options: Its primary focus is planned research blueprint outline.
Its primary focus is legal protection of mental creations.
Its primary focus is voluntary participant agreement process.
Its primary focus is thanking contributors and funders section.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Acknowledgment Section** is: **thanking contributors and funders section**.

slides.question: Q50: In research methodology, what is the primary focus, role, or application of **Thesis Layout Structure**?
options: Its primary focus is single-subject specialist writing piece.
Its primary focus is expert quality check before publication.
Its primary focus is monopoly right for technical invention.
Its primary focus is standardized academic chapter sequence.
slides.explanation: Correct! The primary focus of **Thesis Layout Structure** is: **standardized academic chapter sequence**.

slides.title: Discussion & Review 💬
slides.content: Review your answers for Mock Exam 5. Pay special attention to topics where you selected incorrect answers!

box.content: You have completed Research Methodology Mock Exam 5.
box.note: Solve all 10 mock exams to master the 500 Research Methodology questions!
